games.overview:
"Hatsune Miku: Project DIVA F 2nd" is a brand new rhythm action game featuring the world’s greatest virtual pop star, Hatsune Miku!

Select from a catalog of 40 catchy songs and more than 160 module designs (including modules from the previous installment Project DIVA f/F), and grab front-row seats at the concert of a lifetime. Project DIVA F 2nd features both beloved songs from the series’ library of classics, including Packaged, Melt and Two-sided Lovers, as well as brand new tracks like Two Breaths Walking, Glory 3usi9; and more which are sure to capture your heart.

ENGLISH SUBTITLES
A DIVA series first! Project DIVA F 2nd features translated English subtitles for songs in the Rhythm Game and AR Live/Live Studio modes!

Prefer to sing along to the original Japanese lyrics? Not a problem―you can easily switch between "English" and "Japanese Romaji" in the game's options to suit your preference.
